notes: This JSON is an experiment seed, not production criteria.
The original seed package contained an incorrect repo-PDF availability note; that claim is not treated as authoritative here.

review.title: NLP4PBM: A Systematic Review on Process Extraction using Natural Language Processing with Rule-based, Machine and Deep Learning Methods
review.topic: NLP for process extraction from natural-language text
review.design_intent: Stage 1 keeps only title, abstract, keywords, and first-page observable signals, and defers unstable or full-text-only confirmation to Stage 2.

questions.question: 該研究是否可由書目訊息初步判斷為 conference / journal full research article，而非 poster / short / thesis / report / book chapter？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 metadata 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 若 PDF 首頁或書目記錄可直接支持，引用最短可驗證字串；否則填 metadata_record_only。
questions.location_requirement: bibliographic metadata / first page / venue record
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明缺少年份、頁數、venue、語言或可驗證書目。
questions.stage2_handoff: 此項只做 metadata 記錄；最終 closure 在 Stage 2。

questions.question: 該研究是否可初步確認為英文且可取得 full text？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 metadata 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 若 PDF 首頁或書目記錄可直接支持，引用最短可驗證字串；否則填 metadata_record_only。
questions.location_requirement: bibliographic metadata / first page / venue record
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明缺少年份、頁數、venue、語言或可驗證書目。
questions.stage2_handoff: 此項只做 metadata 記錄；最終 closure 在 Stage 2。

questions.question: title/abstract 是否明確指出研究 specifically covers NLP for process extraction from natural-language text？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。
questions.stage2_handoff: 若只看到 BPM / process mining 而未見 NLP + extraction 關係，交 Stage 2。

questions.question: title/abstract 是否出現從 natural-language text 產生 process model / process representation / control-flow / decision model 的可觀測訊號？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。
questions.stage2_handoff: 若只提 process analysis without extraction target，Stage 2 釐清。

questions.question: title/abstract 是否反而表明研究是 NLP for process redesign、process matching、process prediction 等非目標任務？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。
questions.stage2_handoff: 若 process extraction 與其他任務並存，Stage 2 確認主任務。

questions.question: title/abstract 是否顯示研究只預測 individual labels、做 sentiment analysis、或是從 process 生成自然語言 text，而不是從 text 萃取 process？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。
questions.stage2_handoff: Stage 2 解決 source/target 方向問題。

questions.question: title/abstract 是否清楚顯示它是 survey / review / secondary study？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。
questions.stage2_handoff: publication form / originality 在 Stage 2 完整 closure。

handoff_policy: 若任一核心題只得到 unclear，不得因為缺少摘要訊號而自行補寫新 exclusion。
若 paper 同時出現納入訊號與鄰近非目標訊號，Stage 1 只記錄衝突與 present / absent / unclear 狀態，真正的 semantic closure 交給 Stage 2。
Metadata-only 條件不得覆蓋正文語義；正文語義也不得取代外部可驗證 metadata。
non_goals: 不直接輸出最終納入結論
不把原 SR 的 paper-specific 例子升級成 general rule
不把 performance-oriented hardening 回寫成 formal criteria
